task_objective: Fix Heroic launcher-only listing and Heroic GOG installed-game discovery.
design_decisions: Treat --launcher <launcher> with no other action as a request to list games for that launcher.
Parse Heroic top-level installed arrays from store metadata files.
Prefer the install directory basename over numeric Heroic appName values for display names while preserving appName as appid.
results: Red test run failed on missing GOG installed metadata and missing launcher-only games output.
Implementation passed the expanded pytest suite with 36 tests.
